exercises.explanation: ① 第一个空：后文“relax/happy”，近义词复现“happiness”（快乐），排除sadness/anger；② 第二个空：前文“Music”，原词复现“music”，排除sound/song（片面）；③ 第三个空：前文“Music”原词复现；④ 第四个空：前文“Music”，上下义词复现“instrument”（乐器），“musical instrument”（乐器）固定搭配，排除tool/toy；⑤ 复现类型：近义词复现（happy → happiness）+ 原词复现（music）+ 上下义词复现（Music → instrument）。

exercises.question: Traveling is a great way to relax and learn. Last year, I traveled to a coastal city. The ___ there was blue and clear, and the ___ were soft and white. I tried many kinds of local ___ and met friendly people. This ___ experience made me want to travel more in the future.
exercises.explanation: ① 第一个空：前文“coastal city”（沿海城市），上下义词复现“sea”（大海），排除river/lake（河流/湖泊，非沿海特征）；② 第二个空：前文“coastal city/sea”，上下义词复现“sand”（沙子），排除stone/grass；③ 第三个空：“tried”（尝试）对应“local food”（当地食物），上下义词复现；④ 第四个空：前文“Traveling”，原词复现“travel”，trip/journey虽为近义词，但“travel experience”（旅行经历）更常用；⑤ 复现类型：上下义词复现（coastal city → sea/sand/food）+ 原词复现（Traveling → travel）。

exercises.question: Education is the foundation of success. Every child should have the chance to get a good ___. At ___, we learn knowledge and develop skills. A good ___ background can help us find a good job in the future. We should value our ___ and never stop learning.
exercises.explanation: ① 第一个空：前文“Education”，原词复现“education”，排除school/study（片面）；② 第二个空：前文“get a good education”，上下义词复现“school”（学校，教育的场所）；③ 第三个空：前文“Education”，词性变形复现“educational”（教育的，形容词），“educational background”（教育背景）固定搭配；④ 第四个空：前文“Education/learn knowledge”，近义词复现“study”（学习）；⑤ 复现类型：原词复现（education）+ 上下义词复现（education → school）+ 词性变形复现（education → educational）+ 近义词复现（education → study）。

exercises.question: Animals are an important part of nature. Many wild ___ are facing the danger of extinction. We should take action to protect these ___. Building nature reserves is a good way to provide a safe home for wild ___. Protecting ___ is protecting the balance of nature.
exercises.explanation: ① 第一个空：前文“Animals”，原词复现“animals”，排除plants/birds（单一类别）；② 第二个空：前文“wild animals”，原词复现“animals”；③ 第三个空：前文“wild animals”，原词复现“animals”；④ 第四个空：指代前文“wild animals”（复数），用“them”，排除it；⑤ 复现类型：原词复现（animals）+ 代词指代复现（them）。

exercises.question: Happiness is a feeling that everyone wants to have. When we help others, we feel a sense of ___. Spending time with family makes us feel warm and ___. Even small things like eating a delicious meal can bring us great ___. We should cherish every moment of ___ in life.
exercises.explanation: ① 第一个空：前文“Happiness”，近义词复现“joy”（快乐），排除sadness/anger；② 第二个空：前文“Happiness/joy”，近义词复现“happy”（快乐的），排除sad；③ 第三个空：前文“Happiness/joy/happy”，原词复现“happiness”，排除sadness；④ 第四个空：前文“Happiness/joy/happiness”，近义词复现“joy”；⑤ 复现类型：近义词复现（Happiness → joy/happy/joy）+ 原词复现（Happiness → happiness）。

exercises.question: Sports can improve our physical health. I like playing ___ because it can make me strong. Every morning, I run for 30 minutes and play ___ with my brother. Doing ___ every day can help us keep fit. My favorite ___ is swimming, which is good for the heart.
exercises.explanation: ① 第一个空：前文“Sports”，上下义词复现“football”（足球，运动项目），排除piano/chess（非运动）；② 第二个空：前文“Sports/football”，上下义词复现“basketball”（篮球，运动项目）；③ 第三个空：前文“Sports/football/basketball”，原词复现“sports”，“doing sports”（做运动）固定搭配；④ 第四个空：前文“Sports/football/basketball”，近义词复现“sport”（运动），排除game/activity（片面）；⑤ 复现类型：上下义词复现（Sports → football/basketball）+ 原词复现（sports）+ 近义词复现（Sports → sport）。

exercises.question: Dreams give us motivation to move forward. My biggest ___ is to become a doctor. I study hard every day to realize my ___. Even when I fail exams, I never give up my ___. I believe that with hard work, my ___ will come true one day.
exercises.explanation: ① 第一个空：前文“Dreams”，原词复现“dream”，排除hope/goal（近义词，但核心词是dream）；② 第二个空：前文“dream”，原词复现；③ 第三个空：前文“dream”，原词复现；④ 第四个空：前文“dream”，原词复现；⑤ 复现类型：原词复现（dream）（考查对核心主题词的识别，虽简单但易因忽略复现逻辑选错）。

exercises.question: Books are a treasure of knowledge. Reading ___ can expand our horizons. I have a lot of ___ at home, including storybooks, science books and history ___. My favorite ___ is “To Kill a Mockingbird”, which teaches me a lot about life.
exercises.explanation: ① 第一个空：前文“Books”，原词复现“books”，排除newspapers/novels（片面）；② 第二个空：前文“Books/reading books”，原词复现“books”；③ 第三个空：前文“books/storybooks/science books”，原词复现“books”；④ 第四个空：前文“Books/books/storybooks”，原词复现“book”（单数，指代某一本书）；⑤ 复现类型：原词复现（books/book）（考查单复数变形复现）。

exercises.question: Courage is needed to face challenges. When I had to climb the mountain, I lacked ___ and wanted to give up. But my father encouraged me to find my ___ and keep going. With his encouragement, I found the ___ to reach the top. This experience taught me that ___ is the key to overcoming difficulties.
exercises.explanation: ① 第一个空：前文“Courage”，原词复现“courage”，排除bravery/confidence（近义词，核心词是courage）；② 第二个空：前文“courage”，原词复现；③ 第三个空：前文“courage”，原词复现；④ 第四个空：前文“courage”，原词复现；⑤ 复现类型：原词复现（courage）（考查对抽象名词复现的识别，注意courage不可数）。

exercises.question: Weather affects our daily life. In summer, the ___ is hot and we often feel thirsty. We need to drink more water and stay in cool ___. When the ___ turns cold in winter, we should wear warm clothes and keep our ___ warm. Paying attention to the ___ can help us plan our activities better.
exercises.explanation: ① 第一个空：前文“Weather”，近义词复现“climate”（气候），排除temperature（温度，片面）；② 第二个空：前文“hot”，上下义词复现“places”（地方），“cool places”（凉爽的地方）符合语境；③ 第三个空：前文“Weather/climate”，原词复现“weather”；④ 第四个空：前文“wear warm clothes”，上下义词复现“body”（身体），排除home/hands（片面）；⑤ 第五个空：前文“Weather/climate/weather”，原词复现“weather”；⑥ 复现类型：近义词复现（Weather → climate）+ 原词复现（weather）+ 上下义词复现（hot → places；warm clothes → body）。

exercises.question: Family is the warmest place in the world. My ___ always supports me when I am in trouble. We have dinner together every evening and share our feelings with each other. The love from my ___ makes me feel happy and secure. I cherish every moment I spend with my ___, and I know that my ___ is my strongest backing.
exercises.explanation: ① 第一个空：前文“Family”，原词复现“family”，排除friends（非家人）；② 第二个空：前文“family”，上下义词复现“parents”（父母，家人的小类）；③ 第三个空：前文“Family/parents”，原词复现“family”；④ 第四个空：前文“Family/parents/family”，原词复现“family”；⑤ 复现类型：原词复现（family）+ 上下义词复现（family → parents）。

exercises.question: Water is essential for life. We need ___ to drink, cook and clean. Without enough ___, plants and animals cannot survive. We should save ___ every day to protect our earth. Using ___ wisely is everyone's responsibility.
exercises.explanation: ① 第一个空：前文“Water”，原词复现“water”，排除milk/tea；② 第二个空：前文“water”，原词复现；③ 第三个空：前文“water”，原词复现；④ 第四个空：指代前文“water”（不可数），用“it”，排除them；⑤ 复现类型：原词复现（water）+ 代词指代复现（it）。

exercises.question: Stress is a common problem in modern life. When I feel ___, I usually listen to music or talk to my friends. These ways can help me reduce ___ and feel relaxed. Learning to manage ___ is important for our mental health. If we can control our ___, we can live a happier life.
exercises.explanation: ① 第一个空：前文“Stress”，近义词复现“nervous”（紧张的），排除relaxed/happy；② 第二个空：前文“Stress/nervous”，近义词复现“stress”（压力），排除tension（虽为近义词，但核心词是stress）；③ 第三个空：前文“Stress/stress”，近义词复现“pressure”（压力）；④ 第四个空：前文“Stress/stress/pressure”，近义词复现“emotions”（情绪），“control emotions”（控制情绪）对应压力管理；⑤ 复现类型：近义词复现（Stress → nervous/stress/pressure/emotions）。

exercises.question: Art is a way to express feelings. I like drawing ___ because it can show my inner thoughts. My favorite ___ form is painting, which uses colors and lines to create beauty. Visiting art ___ is my hobby, and I can learn a lot from famous ___.
exercises.explanation: ① 第一个空：前文“Art/drawing”，上下义词复现“pictures”（图画，绘画的成果），排除photos/sketches（片面）；② 第二个空：前文“Art”，原词复现“art”，排除music（非美术）；③ 第三个空：前文“Art/painting”，上下义词复现“museums”（博物馆，艺术场所），“art museums”（艺术博物馆）固定搭配；④ 第四个空：前文“Art/painting/pictures”，上下义词复现“works”（作品，艺术作品），排除paintings/artists（片面）；⑤ 复现类型：原词复现（art）+ 上下义词复现（Art → pictures/museums/works）。

exercises.question: Traffic safety is everyone's responsibility. We should follow the ___ rules when walking or driving. Crossing the road at the ___ light is dangerous, and we must wait for the green ___. Drivers should drive slowly and pay attention to the ___ signs on the road. Obeying ___ rules can prevent accidents.
exercises.explanation: ① 第一个空：前文“Traffic safety”，原词复现“traffic”，“traffic rules”（交通规则）固定搭配；② 第二个空：后文“dangerous/wait for green”，反义词复现“red”（红灯），排除green/yellow；③ 第三个空：前文“red light”，原词复现“light”，“green light”（绿灯）固定搭配；④ 第四个空：前文“traffic rules”，原词复现“traffic”，“traffic signs”（交通标志）固定搭配；⑤ 第五个空：前文“traffic rules”，原词复现“traffic”；⑥ 复现类型：原词复现（traffic/light）+ 反义词复现（green → red）。

exercises.question: Sleep is important for our health. We need enough ___ to let our body rest. Adults should get 7-8 hours of ___ every night, while children need more ___. Poor ___ can lead to tiredness and poor concentration. Getting enough ___ is the key to staying healthy.
exercises.explanation: ① 第一个空：前文“Sleep”，原词复现“sleep”，排除rest/energy；② 第二个空：前文“sleep”，原词复现；③ 第三个空：前文“sleep”，原词复现；④ 第四个空：前文“sleep”，原词复现；⑤ 第五个空：前文“sleep”，原词复现；⑥ 复现类型：原词复现（sleep）（考查对核心主题词的持续识别，易因过度联想近义词而选错）。

exercises.question: Language is a tool for communication. English is an international ___ that is used all over the world. Learning a foreign ___ can help us communicate with people from different countries. I practice speaking ___ every day to improve my oral ___. Mastering a foreign ___ can open up more opportunities for us.
exercises.explanation: ① 第一个空：前文“Language”，原词复现“language”，排除tongue/skill；② 第二个空：前文“language/English”，原词复现“language”；③ 第三个空：前文“English”，原词复现“English”；④ 第四个空：前文“speaking English”，原词复现“English”，“oral English”（英语口语）固定搭配；⑤ 第五个空：前文“Language/language/English”，原词复现“language”；⑥ 复现类型：原词复现（language/English）+ 固定搭配复现（oral English）。

exercises.question: Money is a necessary part of life, but it is not everything. We need ___ to buy food, clothes and houses. However, we should not chase ___ blindly. True happiness does not come from how much ___ we have, but from the love and friendship around us. Using ___ wisely can make our life better, but we should not let ___ control our life.
exercises.explanation: ① 第一个空：前文“Money”，原词复现“money”，排除wealth/cash（近义词，核心词是money）；② 第二个空：前文“money”，近义词复现“wealth”（财富）；③ 第三个空：前文“money/wealth”，原词复现“money”；④ 第四个空：指代前文“money”（不可数），用“it”，排除them；⑤ 第五个空：指代前文“money”，用“it”；⑥ 复现类型：原词复现（money）+ 近义词复现（money → wealth）+ 代词指代复现（it）。

exercises.question: Nature is full of beauty. We can enjoy the beauty of ___ by walking in the forest, climbing mountains or sitting by the lake. The fresh air, green trees and colorful flowers are all part of ___. Protecting ___ is protecting our home. We should respect ___ and live in harmony with ___.

options.B: the world; earth; nature; them; them

exercises.explanation: ① 第一个空：前文“Nature”，原词复现“nature”，排除world/environment；② 第二个空：前文“nature/fresh air/green trees”，原词复现“nature”；③ 第三个空：前文“nature”，原词复现；④ 第四个空：指代前文“nature”（不可数），用“it”，排除them；⑤ 第五个空：指代前文“nature”，用“it”；⑥ 复现类型：原词复现（nature）+ 代词指代复现（it）。

exercises.question: Memory is a precious gift. We keep happy ___ in our mind and cherish them forever. When I look at old photos, I recall the sweet ___ of my childhood. Sharing my happy ___ with my family makes me feel warm. These beautiful ___ are the most valuable part of my life.
exercises.explanation: ① 第一个空：前文“Memory”，词性变形复现“memories”（记忆，复数），排除moments/experiences；② 第二个空：前文“memories/childhood”，原词复现“memories”；③ 第三个空：前文“memories”，原词复现；④ 第四个空：前文“memories”，原词复现；⑤ 复现类型：词性变形复现（Memory → memories）+ 原词复现（memories）。

exercises.question: Patience is the key to success. Learning a new skill requires ___ and hard work. When I learn to play the piano, I need to practice every day with ___. Even when I make mistakes, I keep practicing with ___. I believe that with enough ___, I can play the piano well one day.
exercises.explanation: ① 第一个空：前文“Patience”，原词复现“patience”，排除effort/time；② 第二个空：前文“patience”，原词复现；③ 第三个空：前文“patience”，原词复现；④ 第四个空：前文“patience”，原词复现；⑤ 复现类型：原词复现（patience）（考查对抽象名词复现的识别，易因忽略主题词而选effort/time）。

exercises.question: Holiday is a time to relax and enjoy life. During the summer ___, I usually travel with my family. We visit different places and experience different cultures during the ___. My favorite ___ is the Spring Festival, when all family members get together. Spending time with family during ___ is the happiest thing for me.
exercises.explanation: ① 第一个空：前文“Holiday”，近义词复现“holiday”/“vacation”，“summer holiday”（暑假）固定搭配；② 第二个空：前文“summer holiday/travel”，近义词复现“vacation”（假期）；③ 第三个空：后文“Spring Festival”，近义词复现“festival”（节日，假期的小类）；④ 第四个空：前文“Holiday/holiday/vacation/festival”，原词复现“holidays”（复数）；⑤ 复现类型：近义词复现（Holiday → holiday/vacation/festival）+ 原词复现（holidays）+ 上下义词复现（holiday → festival）。

exercises.question: Health is more important than wealth. Keeping ___ is the most important thing in life. We should do exercise every day to maintain ___. Eating healthy food and getting enough sleep are good for our ___. If we lose our ___, we will lose everything, so we should value our ___ above all.
exercises.explanation: ① 第一个空：前文“Health”，词性变形复现“healthy”（健康的，形容词），“keeping healthy”（保持健康）固定搭配；② 第二个空：前文“healthy”，近义词复现“fit”（健康的），“maintain fit”（保持健康）；③ 第三个空：前文“Health/healthy/fit”，原词复现“health”（名词）；④ 第四个空：前文“health”，近义词复现“fitness”（健康状况）；⑤ 第五个空：前文“Health/healthy/fit/health/fitness”，原词复现“health”；⑥ 复现类型：词性变形复现（Health → healthy）+ 近义词复现（Health → fit/fitness）+ 原词复现（health）。

exercises.question: Internet has changed the way we live and work. We use the ___ to search for information, watch videos and chat with friends. Working on the ___ has become common, and many people work from home via the ___. However, we should not spend too much time on the ___ to avoid eye problems.
exercises.explanation: ① 第一个空：前文“Internet”，原词复现“internet”，排除computer/phone（工具，非核心）；② 第二个空：前文“internet”，原词复现；③ 第三个空：前文“internet”，原词复现；④ 第四个空：前文“internet”，原词复现；⑤ 复现类型：原词复现（internet）（考查对核心主题词的识别，易因混淆“工具（computer/phone）”和“核心（internet）”而选错）。

exercises.question: Kindness is a virtue that everyone should have. Being ___ to others can make the world a better place. When we show ___ to people in need, we can make them feel warm and loved. Small acts of ___ can bring great joy to others. We should always keep a ___ heart and help others as much as possible.
exercises.explanation: ① 第一个空：前文“Kindness”，词性变形复现“kind”（善良的，形容词），“being kind to others”（对他人善良）固定搭配；② 第二个空：前文“Kindness/kind”，原词复现“kindness”（名词）；③ 第三个空：前文“kindness”，原词复现；④ 第四个空：前文“Kindness/kind/kindness/kindness”，词性变形复现“kind”（形容词），“kind heart”（善良的心）；⑤ 复现类型：词性变形复现（Kindness → kind）+ 原词复现（kindness）。

exercises.question: Success is the result of hard work and persistence. Achieving ___ requires effort and dedication. When I finally achieved my ___, I felt proud and happy. My ___ is to become a successful writer, and I will keep working hard to reach my ___. I believe that everyone can achieve their ___ with hard work.
exercises.explanation: ① 第一个空：前文“Success”，原词复现“success”，排除goal；② 第二个空：前文“success”，原词复现；③ 第三个空：前文“success/achieve success”，近义词复现“goal”（目标）；④ 第四个空：前文“goal”，原词复现；⑤ 第五个空：前文“Success/success/goal/goal”，原词复现“success”；⑥ 复现类型：原词复现（success/goal）+ 近义词复现（success → goal）。

exercises.question: Noise can affect our mood and health. Too much ___ can make us feel stressed and anxious. We should avoid making loud ___ in public places to respect others. Living in a quiet environment without much ___ is good for our mental health. Reducing ___ pollution can improve our quality of life.
exercises.explanation: ① 第一个空：前文“Noise”，原词复现“noise”，排除sound/voice（sound泛指声音，voice指嗓音，核心词是noise）；② 第二个空：前文“noise”，原词复现，“loud noise”（噪音）固定搭配；③ 第三个空：前文“noise”，原词复现；④ 第四个空：前文“noise”，原词复现，“noise pollution”（噪音污染）固定搭配；⑤ 复现类型：原词复现（noise）+ 固定搭配复现（loud noise/noise pollution）。

exercises.question: Age is just a number, and what matters is the attitude towards life. When I was young, I thought that ___ was a barrier to doing what I liked. But now I realize that ___ does not limit our dreams. My grandmother is 70 years old, but her ___ does not stop her from learning new things. I believe that no matter what ___ we are, we can chase our dreams as long as we have passion.
exercises.explanation: ① 第一个空：前文“Age”，原词复现“age”，排除time/year；② 第二个空：前文“age”，原词复现；③ 第三个空：前文“70 years old/age”，原词复现；④ 第四个空：前文“age/age/age”，原词复现；⑤ 复现类型：原词复现（age）（考查对核心主题词的识别，易因混淆time/year而选错）。
